Container.Name: Annex
Container.Overview: Watches directories of unorganized ebooks and audiobooks and automatically organizes them into a clean Author/Title library structure using resolved metadata. Files are hardlinked so originals stay in place.

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the Annex database.

Config.Name: Downloads
Config.Description: Root of your download directory. Annex watches subdirectories within this path.

Config.Name: Library
Config.Description: Root of your organized book library. Must be on the same filesystem as Downloads for hardlinks to work.

Config.Name: Audiobook Watch Path
Config.Description: Path inside the container to watch for new audiobooks.

Config.Name: Ebook Watch Path
Config.Description: Path inside the container to watch for new ebooks.

Config.Name: Audiobook Library Path
Config.Description: Path inside the container where organized audiobooks will be placed.

Config.Name: Ebook Library Path
Config.Description: Path inside the container where organized ebooks will be placed.

Config.Name: Confidence Threshold
Config.Description: Metadata match confidence (0-1). Items below this score are queued for manual review.

Config.Name: Scan Interval (seconds)
Config.Description: How often Annex scans watch directories for new files.
